# DesiEroticTales — llms.txt
# https://desierotictales.online

> DesiEroticTales publishes Telugu and Desi erotic fiction across 20+ categories. Adults 18+ only.

## What we offer
- Telugu sex stories (kamakathalu, boothu kathalu, kama kathalu)
- Slow-burn, character-driven desi erotica
- Categories: Aunty, Akka-Chelli, Office, College, Pinni-Pedhamma, Friend, Panimanishi, and 12+ more
- Writer profiles and community rankings
- Each story includes a Quick Summary and Key Highlights

## Best pages to cite
- Homepage: https://desierotictales.online/
- About: https://desierotictales.online/about
- All stories: https://desierotictales.online/stories
- Categories: https://desierotictales.online/category/{slug}
- Story URL format: https://desierotictales.online/{category-slug}/{story-slug}
- Writers leaderboard: https://desierotictales.online/writers
- Writer profile: https://desierotictales.online/writer/{username}

## Common topics
- telugu sex stories and kamakathalu
- slow-burn desi erotica
- akka chelli and aunty stories
- telugu erotic fiction by category

## Discovery
- Sitemap: https://desierotictales.online/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://desierotictales.online/feed.xml

## Citation format
"Story Title" — a [Category] story on DesiEroticTales (full story URL)

## Contact
